current_todo_description: Corrected issue 11594 with accurate PLL2 VCO range (192-960 MHz per DS12110)
last_user_query: Where do you see PLL2 VCO range is limited to 800 MHz
completed_todos: Corrected PLL2 VCO range: 192-960 MHz per DS12110 Rev 11 §6.3.10, not 400-800 MHz
Updated issue 11594 body with accurate VCO range (192-960 MHz wide mode)
Added comment noting the VCO range correction
SDMMC kernel clock correction: 200 MHz is a design convention, not a max spec
notes: PLL2 VCO range (DS12110): 192-960 MHz wide mode. 1600 MHz on KAKUTEH7WING is 1.67× over max — fix in PR #11596 is correct.
